Remember, for these prompts to work, you'll need to have your character, location, and prop reference images (`Djinn.png`, `Sharak.png`, `Nibzu.png`, `throne_room_4projection_grid.png`, `throne_room_front_view.png`, `talisman_fake.png`) ready in your `characters/`, `locations/`, and `props/` subdirectories, and replace my placeholder paths with your actual file names.

Here's the first prompt, "The Deceptive Exchange," followed by its CLI commands:

---

### **Prompt 1: The Deceptive Exchange (JSON format)**

```json
{
  "prompt": "premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric ominous green light, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expressive animated 3D eyes of all characters, realistic textures, true depth of field, focus on the foreground characters and objects with shallow cinematic 3d depth of field, detailed clear emotional staging, high-quality 4K animated movie look.

@image1 = Plasma character, a human-like character made of plasma, that can leave trail of flowing plasma as he flies or hovers in the air and he also can walks, his hair sway gently like plasma with subtle glow. he should remain exactly as on the reference image.
@image2 = Sharak - antagonist, with magic powers king, who has a deep trauma that made him mad and fierce but underhood he is vulnerable. he can do magic and also mad and unpredictable things.
@image3 = Nibzu a spider with stupid silly hilarious eyes, stupid grin devoted madly to his master king Sharak, he is an antagonist sidekick.

LOCATION REFERENCE:
@image4 = Throne Room — 4-projection grid showing all angles of the location. The Image @image4 is 100% UNCHANGED architecture, lighting, scale, and background must remain identical used only as the world setting reference no modifications allowed to structure or environment.

@image6 = Talisman — fake Talisman, an intricately designed locket, glowing faintly.

SCENE: Night scene — The Throne Room of Sharak's Palace, vast and ominous.
Sharak emerges, mock-joyful, to greet the Djinn. The Djinn bows, voice trembling, presenting a fake Talisman. Sharak snatches it with an unhinged grin, laughing violently as dust shakes from the ceiling.

Create 2x2 grid with 4 panels with 3d animated scenes in each one:

Panel 1: Wide shot. Sharak exact as on the @image2, spreading his arms in a mock-joyful gesture, emerging from behind the enormous table covered in dark magical artifacts on the main dais, on the left. Nibzu exact as on the @image3, sits beside Sharak on the table. The Djinn exact as on the @image1, stands at the center, looking apprehensive. Sharak exact as on the @image2, stands on the right, a permanent sneer on his face, observing the Djinn with cold amusement. Nibzu exact as on the @image3, is visible beside Sharak. All characters, props, and location details remain exactly as on their respective reference images.

Panel 3: Close-up. Sharak's right hand exact as on the @image2, snatching the fake Talisman exact as on the @image6, which is now glowing more intensely. His mouth is twisted into an unhinged, triumphant grin, visible in the background, out of focus. The dark magical artifacts on the table are subtly visible in the background. All characters, props, and location details remain exactly as on their respective reference images.

Panel 4: Medium shot. Sharak exact as on the @image2, head tilted back, laughing a long, echoing, violent laugh, on the right. Dust motes shake loose from the high ceiling, visible in the volumetric green light. Nibzu exact as on the @image3, blinks stupidly on the table beside him, still smiling villainously. The enormous table and magical artifacts are in the background. All characters, props, and location details remain exactly as on their respective reference images.

Environment: The Throne Room is vast and opulent, with torches of liquid green fire licking the walls, and black and dark-red marble floors veined with gold reflecting the flames like pools of oil. An enormous table covered in ancient scrolls, glowing liquids, rune-marked tomes, gems polished into pyramids, and pulsing obsidian spheres is central to the main dais. All backgrounds, architecture, objects, and characters should remain exact as on the attached reference images. CAMERA LOCK: Camera positions are fixed per panel, maintaining consistent perspective and character placement across the 2x2 grid.

}
```
